tools.name: web_search
tools.label: 联网搜索
tools.description: Search the web for recent information and return titles, links, and snippets.

tools.name: http_request
tools.label: HTTP 请求
tools.description: Send an HTTP request and return response status, headers, and body preview.

method.description: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, or HEAD

tools.name: invoke_model
tools.label: 调用模型
tools.description: Call the default model or a configured model profile for a specialized sub-task.

profile.description: profile id or name, or default

capability.description: optional required capability: orchestration, chat, vision, image_generation, image_editing, speech_to_text, text_to_speech, or embedding

tools.name: analyze_image
tools.label: Analyze Image
tools.description: Analyze one or more image uploads, URLs, or data URLs with a configured vision-capable specialist model. Use this for image recognition and visual question answering.

images.description: image URLs, /uploads paths, or data URLs

prompt.description: question or instruction for the image analysis

detail.description: optional image detail: auto, low, high, or original

profile.description: optional profile id or name override

tools.name: generate_image
tools.label: Generate Image
tools.description: Generate image artifacts from a text prompt using a configured image-generation specialist model.

quality.description: optional quality such as low, medium, high, standard, or hd

outputFormat.description: optional output format such as png, jpeg, or webp

profile.description: optional profile id or name override

tools.name: edit_image
tools.label: Edit Image
tools.description: Edit source image uploads, URLs, or data URLs with a prompt using a configured image-editing specialist model.

images.description: source image URLs, /uploads paths, or data URLs

inputFidelity.description: optional input fidelity: low or high

outputFormat.description: optional output format such as png, jpeg, or webp

profile.description: optional profile id or name override

tools.name: transcribe_audio
tools.label: Transcribe Audio
tools.description: Transcribe an audio upload, URL, or data URL using a configured speech-to-text specialist model.

audio.description: audio URL, /uploads path, or data URL

profile.description: optional profile id or name override

tools.name: synthesize_speech
tools.label: Synthesize Speech
tools.description: Generate an audio artifact from text using a configured text-to-speech specialist model.

voice.description: optional voice name, defaults to alloy

profile.description: optional profile id or name override

tools.name: calculator
tools.label: 计算器
tools.description: Evaluate a math expression and return the result.

tools.name: file_read
tools.label: 读取文件
tools.description: Read a UTF-8 file or list a directory only when the path is inside allowed file roots. If outside, do not call — use shell_command.

path.description: workspace-relative path or absolute path under an allowed file root

tools.name: file_write
tools.label: 写入文件
tools.description: Write UTF-8 content only when the path is inside allowed file roots. If outside, do not call — ask the user to update Settings or use shell_command.

path.description: workspace-relative or absolute path under an allowed file root

tools.name: recall_memory
tools.label: 检索记忆
tools.description: Search daily, dream, long-term, or script memory for useful context.

tools.name: search_skills
tools.label: Search Skills
tools.description: Search internet skill marketplaces and registries, aggregate relevant skills, and return install-ready results. Use local search only when the user explicitly asks for local skills.

query.description: what kind of skill to find

source.description: optional marketplace name, website, or source the user explicitly asked to search

website.description: optional website URL the user explicitly asked to search

marketplaceIds.description: optional marketplace ids to limit marketplace search

tools.name: install_skill
tools.label: Install Skill
tools.description: Download and install a skill from a supported marketplace into Nexo.

marketplaceId.description: marketplace id such as skills-sh or heurist-mesh

installSpec.description: install spec or slug returned by search_skills

tools.name: create_skill
tools.label: Create Skill
tools.description: Create or update a managed custom skill from conversation input and save it into Nexo's local skill library.

category.description: skill category such as coding, writing, analysis

instruction.description: skill body or full SKILL.md content

enabled.description: whether the skill should be enabled immediately

tools.name: create_scheduled_task
tools.label: 创建定时任务
tools.description: Create a Nexo scheduled task that appears in the Tasks panel and is executed by Nexo's scheduler. Use this whenever the user asks to create a reminder, scheduled prompt, recurring job, or one-off task. Prefer delayMinutes for relative requests like 'in 5 minutes', runAt for a specific datetime, and cron for recurring schedules. Do not use shell_command for reminders unless the user explicitly asks for an OS-level task.

name.description: short task name shown in the Tasks panel

prompt.description: prompt to run when the task triggers

cron.description: optional 5-field cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week

delayMinutes.description: optional relative delay in minutes for a one-off task

runAt.description: optional future datetime for a one-off task, preferably ISO 8601 with timezone

enabled.description: whether the task is enabled immediately; defaults to true

runOnce.description: disable the task after it runs once; defaults to true when delayMinutes or runAt is used

tools.name: shell_command
tools.label: Shell Command
tools.description: Run a shell command. Omit timeoutMs to use the configured default (Settings → default script timeout, usually 5 minutes). Do not start long-running dev servers (vite, npm run dev) — they never exit. Do not set timeoutMs below 60000 unless the command finishes in seconds.

timeoutMs.description: optional timeout in milliseconds, 1000-600000; omit to use Settings default
